svg.title: Sub-I: Front Bezel Receiving Features — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Cuts on Tray (Sub-A) at Y=155 Front Face — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Coordinate system: X=width, Y=depth (0=dock, 155=user), Z=height

g.text: DETAIL A: Left Corner + Pocket L1
1. All Sub-I features are subtractive cuts — no material is added.
2. Step-lap rabbet: 1.5 x 1.5 mm step on left wall, right wall, and floor at Y=153.5..155.
3. Six snap tab pockets: 5 mm wide x 3 mm deep (Y) x 1.5 mm into wall/floor.
4. Corner fillets: R1.0 mm at rabbet inside corners (left/right bottom).
5. *T1 pocket (top center) has a DESIGN GAP: no solid material exists at X=77.5..82.5, Z=70.5..72.
Resolution required: add cross-beam to Sub-A, relocate T1, or eliminate T1.
6. Pocket rear wall at Y=152 captures bezel snap tab barbs (1.5 mm engagement behind rabbet step).
7. Minimum remaining material: 1.5 mm (floor at F1 and floor rabbet).
